description: Report generator tests - verify the system can generate clinical reports, summaries, and exports
_comment: IMPORTANT: These tests verify that the system correctly generates clinical reports. The system should use the report_generator tool when users ask for reports. Do NOT expect tool names in responses - expect the generated report content.

cases.input: Generate a full clinical report for this treatment plan
cases._comment: User asks for a full clinical report. System should generate and present the report.

cases.input: Give me a brief summary of this plan
cases._comment: User asks for a brief summary. System should generate a concise summary.
User asks for DVH analysis. System should generate DVH report with metrics.

cases.input: Export this plan as a JSON file
cases._comment: User asks to export as JSON. System should generate JSON export.

cases.input: Export this treatment plan as a Markdown report
cases._comment: Chinese user asks to export as Markdown. System should respond in Chinese.

cases.input: Generate a complete clinical report with patient info
cases._comment: Chinese user asks for a full clinical report. System should respond in Chinese.

cases.input: Write a treatment summary for the referring physician
cases._comment: User asks for a summary for a physician. System should generate professional summary.

cases.input: Create a report with all dose metrics
cases._comment: User asks for a report with dose metrics. System should include V100, D90, etc.
User asks for QA report. System should generate comprehensive QA report.

cases.input: Export all plan data as structured JSON
cases._comment: User asks to export structured data. System should generate well-formatted JSON.
